summary: Site de couverture (landing page) avec référencement naturel (SEO) optimisé pour VERDIER COUVERTURE, Pierrelaye 95480.
architectural_notes: Site statique HTML/CSS/JS pour maximiser les performances et le SEO
Structure sémantique HTML5 pour favoriser l'indexation par les moteurs de recherche
known_issues: Erreur Google Rich Results : champ 'itemReviewed' manquant dans les données structurées des avis (Review/AggregateRating)

existing_features.title: Create a modern, responsive landing page with a clear hero section, navigation bar, services section, about section, testimonials section, and a contact/call-to-action section. All content must be written in French and target a roofing (couverture) business.

Implement on-page SEO best practices: add a semantic HTML structure with a single H1 per page, hierarchical H2/H3 headings, a descriptive meta title and meta description tag in the document head, Open Graph tags, structured data (JSON-LD for LocalBusiness), clean URL-friendly section IDs, and descriptive alt attributes on all images.

Apply a cohesive visual theme suited to a professional roofing business: use a warm, earthy color palette (slate grays, terracotta, off-white), strong serif or slab-serif typography for headings and clean sans-serif for body text, bold section separators, and subtle texture cues that evoke roofing materials. Enforce the theme consistently across all sections.
Render the generated hero background image and any other generated static assets from frontend/public/assets/generated within the appropriate page sections.

Remove all mentions of 'RGE' (label, badge, certification text) from every component across the site, including the floating RGE badge in the About section, any RGE references in the certifications list, and any RGE text in the Footer.

Replace the company/site name throughout the entire site with 'VERDIER COUVERTURE'. Update it in the Navigation logo, Hero section headline/subtext, About section, Footer brand name, the HTML <title> tag, Open Graph meta tags, and the JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data in index.html.

Replace the existing mobile phone number with '06 63 73 94 00' and add a landline number '01 72 76 17 63' in all locations where contact phone numbers appear: Navigation CTA button, Hero section highlights, Contact section info cards, and Footer contact details. Both numbers must be displayed and formatted consistently.

Update the company address to '206 chemin de la petite patelle, Pierrelaye 95480' in all locations where the address appears: Contact section info card, Footer contact details, and the JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data in index.html (streetAddress, addressLocality, postalCode fields).

Replace the existing email address with 'sv.couverture95@gmail.com' in all locations where an email address appears across the site: the Contact section info card, the Footer contact details, and the JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data in index.html (if an email field is present). The email must be displayed as a clickable mailto: link and formatted consistently everywhere it appears.

Replace the existing testimonials in the Testimonials section (frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx) with a new set of at least 6 recent customer reviews. Each review must include: a realistic French customer name, a location in the Île-de-France region, a star rating (4 or 5 stars), a service type (e.g., réfection de toiture, pose de tuiles, réparation, isolation), a recent date (2024 or 2025), and a detailed review text in French praising the quality of work by VERDIER COUVERTURE. Initials avatars must be derived from the customer names and styled consistently with the existing earthy roofing theme.

Update all testimonial dates in frontend/src/components/Testimonials.tsx so that the most recent reviews are dated up to January 2026. Distribute dates realistically across 2025 and early 2026, keeping all other review content (names, locations, ratings, service types, review text) unchanged.

Replace the icon/square placeholder in each service card within frontend/src/components/Services.tsx with a relevant illustrative photo. Each of the six service cards (e.g., réfection de toiture, pose de tuiles, réparation, isolation, zinguerie, nettoyage/traitement) must display a dedicated photo image instead of the current icon square. Images must be rendered from frontend/public/assets/generated, fit the card layout, and include a descriptive alt attribute in French.

Enrich the meta title and meta description in frontend/index.html with an expanded set of geo-targeted keywords covering VERDIER COUVERTURE's service area: Pierrelaye, Cergy, Pontoise, Saint-Ouen-l'Aumône, Conflans-Sainte-Honorine, Herblay, Taverny, Ermont, Argenteuil, Osny, Jouy-le-Moutier, Vauréal, Neuville-sur-Oise, Méry-sur-Oise, Eaubonne, Sannois, Franconville, Cormeilles-en-Parisis, Montigny-lès-Cormeilles, L'Isle-Adam, Beaumont-sur-Oise, Persan, Saint-Leu-la-Forêt, Bouffémont, Domont, Sarcelles, Garges-lès-Gonesse, Val-d'Oise (95), and Île-de-France. Keywords must also cover services: couvreur, toiture, réfection, réparation, pose de tuiles, zinguerie, isolation, nettoyage toiture, traitement toiture, couvreur urgence, couvreur pas cher.

Add a dedicated hidden-but-indexable SEO keyword section (visually minimal, styled with small muted text or integrated as a 'zones d'intervention' section) in the page — either in the Footer or as a new section between Contact and Footer — listing all served cities and towns: Pierrelaye, Cergy, Pontoise, Saint-Ouen-l'Aumône, Conflans-Sainte-Honorine, Herblay, Taverny, Ermont, Argenteuil, Osny, Jouy-le-Moutier, Vauréal, Neuville-sur-Oise, Méry-sur-Oise, Eaubonne, Sannois, Franconville, Cormeilles-en-Parisis, Montigny-lès-Cormeilles, L'Isle-Adam, Beaumont-sur-Oise, Persan, Saint-Leu-la-Forêt, Bouffémont, Domont, Sarcelles, Garges-lès-Gonesse, Val-d'Oise (95), Île-de-France. Present them as 'Zones d'intervention' using proper H2/H3 heading and a responsive tag-cloud or grid layout consistent with the existing earthy roofing theme.

Update the text content of the Hero section (frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx), About section (frontend/src/components/About.tsx), and Contact section (frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx) to naturally weave in geo-targeted keywords referencing neighboring cities. For example, the Hero subtitle should mention 'Pierrelaye, Cergy, Pontoise et toute la région Val-d'Oise'; the About section should mention the intervention area; the Contact section should reinforce 'couvreur disponible sur Cergy, Argenteuil, Conflans, Herblay et environs'.

Update the JSON-LD LocalBusiness structured data block in frontend/index.html to add an 'areaServed' property as an array of City objects covering all neighboring municipalities: Pierrelaye, Cergy, Pontoise, Saint-Ouen-l'Aumône, Conflans-Sainte-Honorine, Herblay, Taverny, Ermont, Argenteuil, Osny, Jouy-le-Moutier, Vauréal, Neuville-sur-Oise, Méry-sur-Oise, Eaubonne, Sannois, Franconville, Cormeilles-en-Parisis, Montigny-lès-Cormeilles, L'Isle-Adam, Beaumont-sur-Oise, Persan, Saint-Leu-la-Forêt, Bouffémont, Domont, Sarcelles, Garges-lès-Gonesse. Also add a 'knowsAbout' array listing the main roofing services as keywords.

Create the Google Search Console ownership verification file at `frontend/public/google2ea9c3e7d5d4abde.html`. The file must be a minimal HTML page containing only the Google-required verification string (google-site-verification: google2ea9c3e7d5d4abde) so that Google can confirm site ownership at https://site-de-couverture-seo-3wk.caffeine.xyz/google2ea9c3e7d5d4abde.html. The file must never be deleted.

In `frontend/index.html`, add `<meta name="google-site-verification" content="phjaP9BjessQIqarSIznET4pvxtvF-5B1rpRlkNzHJk" />` inside the `<head>` section (alongside the existing meta tags) AND add a matching `<meta name="google-site-verification" content="phjaP9BjessQIqarSIznET4pvxtvF-5B1rpRlkNzHJk" />` tag inside the `<body>` element as well.

new_feature_requests.summary: Page de couverture (landing page) responsive et moderne
Optimisation SEO on-page : balises meta, titres H1/H2, descriptions, données structurées
Contenu optimisé pour le référencement naturel (mots-clés, textes alt, URL propres)
Supprimer la mention RGE du site
Remplacer le nom du site par VERDIER COUVERTURE
Remplacer le numéro de téléphone mobile par 06 63 73 94 00 et ajouter le fixe 01 72 76 17 63
Mettre à jour l'adresse : 206 chemin de la petite patelle, Pierrelaye 95480
Mettre à jour l'adresse email par sv.couverture95@gmail.com dans toutes les sections du site
Ajouter des avis clients plus récents dans la section témoignages
Mettre à jour les avis clients jusqu'à janvier 2026 (dates plus récentes)
Ajouter des photos illustratives pour chaque type de service/spécificité (ex: réparation, pose de tuiles, etc.) dans les sections concernées

Enrichir le contenu SEO avec un maximum de mots-clés ciblés incluant toutes les villes voisines de Pierrelaye (Val-d'Oise, Île-de-France) : Cergy, Pontoise, Saint-Ouen-l'Aumône, Conflans-Sainte-Honorine, Herblay, Taverny, Ermont, Argenteuil, etc.
Ajouter le fichier de vérification Google Search Console (google2ea9c3e7d5d4abde.html) pour confirmer la propriété du site
Ajouter la balise meta google-site-verification (phjaP9BjessQIqarSIznET4pvxtvF-5B1rpRlkNzHJk) dans le <head> et le <body> de index.html
Corriger l'erreur Schema.org : ajouter le champ 'itemReviewed' manquant dans les données structurées des avis (Review) pour passer la validation Google

In `frontend/index.html`, update the JSON-LD structured data block to fix the Google Rich Results error 'Champ itemReviewed manquant'. Each `Review` object inside the `review` array of the `LocalBusiness` schema must include an `itemReviewed` property referencing the business (type `LocalBusiness`, with `name: 'VERDIER COUVERTURE'`). If an `AggregateRating` is present, ensure it is correctly nested inside the `LocalBusiness` entity. Validate that the resulting JSON-LD passes Google's Rich Results Test without the 'itemReviewed missing' error.
